title: Moonshot AI's Kimi shines spotlight on Alibaba and Tencent
excerpt: Alibaba bought a 36% stake in Moonshot during a February 2024 funding round, while Tencent is also a known investor.
content_html:
China's latest star AI model is putting 2 tech giants back in the spotlight

By Huileng Tan

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

China's Kimi K3 has emerged as the latest AI model sensation, drawing so much interest that developer Moonshot AI temporarily paused new subscriptions just days after launch.

"K3 represented another instance where the ability of China's top AI labs to keep pace with the US frontier has surprised global investors," Bernstein analysts led by Robin Zhu wrote in a Friday note.

Beyond the excitement surrounding Moonshot itself, Kimi's breakout is bringing fresh attention to Chinese tech giants Alibaba and Tencent, both investors in the startup.

Alibaba acquired a 36% stake in Moonshot during a February 2024 funding round, while Tencent is also a known investor.

But their opportunity extends beyond their Moonshot stakes, Bernstein's analysts wrote. As AI models become more competitive, cloud providers and internet platforms stand to gain bargaining power over the model makers.

For Alibaba, Bernstein said Kimi's success is "probably a positive for Alicloud revenue growth."

Tencent, meanwhile, may have an overlooked asset in Workbuddy, its desktop AI assistant, which has 8 million to 9 million monthly visits.

Alibaba shares rose as much as 6% in Hong Kong on Monday, while Tencent gained 4%. The Hang Seng Tech Index climbed 4%, as Kimi reignited the AI narrative that DeepSeek helped spark last year. The broader Hang Seng Index added over 2%.

The enthusiasm for Kimi has also fueled a broader debate over AI economics.

AI chip stocks sold off sharply on Friday, with investors questioning whether lower-cost Chinese models could reduce the need for the massive AI infrastructure spending underpinning the current boom.

Chinese AI models are approaching frontier-level performance while priced closer to mid-tier US systems.

"That challenges the economics of the current US-led AI stack, where frontier capability has been associated with very high compute and capital intensity," Deutsche Bank analyst Jim Reid wrote in a note on Monday.

The concerns weighed on South Korea's stock markets, which were on a red-hot rally until late last month,

On Monday, South Korea's benchmark Kospi index closed 4% lower as index heavyweight Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix both lost over 4%. The Kospi is now 28% lower than a month ago, although it's still 55% higher this year to date.

The Japanese markets were closed for a public holiday.

Read next

Huileng Tan

You're currently following this author! Want to unfollow? Unsubscribe via the link in your email.

Huileng Tan is a senior reporter based in Singapore, covering markets, the global economy, commodities, and investing. Her reporting focuses on how shifts in money, demographics, technology, and policy are reshaping businesses, wealth, and everyday life around the world.Since joining Business Insider in 2021, she has covered everything from commodity booms and investor trends to China's economy, the AI trade, and the forces driving global markets.Before joining Business Insider, she reported for CNBC, Dow Jones, ICIS, and The Wall Street Journal.In 2018 and 2019, she won the Singapore Exchange Orb Awards for Story of the Year – Derivatives for her reporting on the global commodities and derivatives markets.Reach her at htan@businessinsider.com.

sentences.zh: 她的报道重点关注货币、人口、技术和政策的变化如何重塑世界各地的商业、财富和日常生活。自 2021 年加入《商业内幕》以来，她报道了从大宗商品繁荣和投资者趋势到中国经济、人工智能贸易以及推动全球市场的力量等方方面面。在加入《商业内幕》之前，她曾为 CNBC、道琼斯、安迅思和《华尔街日报》进行报道。2018 年和 2019 年，她赢得了新加坡交易所因其对全球大宗商品和衍生品市场的报道而荣获 Orb 年度故事奖 - 衍生品。请通过 htan@businessinsider.com 与她联系。

content_html_zh:
中国最新的明星人工智能模型让两家科技巨头重新成为人们关注的焦点

作者：Huileng Tan 您目前正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

中国的 Kimi K3 已成为最新的人工智能模型，引起了极大的关注，以至于开发商 Moonshot AI 在推出几天后就暂时停止了新的订阅。

以 Robin Zhu 为首的伯恩斯坦分析师在周五的一份报告中写道：“K3 代表了中国顶级人工智能实验室与美国前沿保持同步的能力的另一个例子，这让全球投资者感到惊讶。”

除了 Moonshot 本身令人兴奋之外，Kimi 的突破也给中国科技巨头阿里巴巴和腾讯带来了新的关注，这两家公司都是这家初创公司的投资者。

阿里巴巴在 2024 年 2 月的一轮融资中收购了 Moonshot 36% 的股份，而腾讯也是知名投资者。

但伯恩斯坦的分析师写道，他们的机会超出了他们的登月股份。 随着人工智能模型变得更具竞争力，云提供商和互联网平台将获得对模型制造商的议价能力。

对于阿里巴巴来说，伯恩斯坦表示，Kimi 的成功“可能对阿里云收入增长产生积极影响”。

与此同时，腾讯的桌面人工智能助手 Workbuddy 可能有一个被忽视的资产，该助手每月的访问量为 800 万至 900 万。

周一，阿里巴巴股价在香港上涨 6%，腾讯股价上涨 4%。 随着 Kimi 重新点燃了 DeepSeek 去年帮助引发的人工智能叙事，恒生科技指数上涨了 4%。 恒生指数整体上涨超过 2%。

对 Kimi 的热情也引发了关于人工智能经济学的更广泛的争论。

人工智能芯片股票周五大幅抛售，投资者质疑成本较低的中国模型是否可以减少支撑当前繁荣的大规模人工智能基础设施支出的需求。

中国人工智能模型的性能正在接近前沿水平，而价格则接近美国中端系统。

德意志银行分析师 Jim Reid 在周一的一份报告中写道：“这对当前美国主导的人工智能堆栈的经济性提出了挑战，其中前沿能力与非常高的计算和资本密集度相关。”

这些担忧令韩国股市承压，直到上月底为止，韩国股市一直在强劲上涨。

周一，韩国基准 Kospi 指数收盘下跌 4%，其中权重股三星电子 (Samsung Electronics) 和 SK 海力士 (SK Hynix) 均下跌超过 4%。 目前 Kospi 指数比一个月前下降了 28%，尽管今年迄今为止仍上涨了 55%。

日本市场因公众假期休市。

阅读下一篇

谭辉冷 您正在关注该作者！ 想要取消关注吗？ 通过电子邮件中的链接取消订阅。

Huileng Tan 是驻新加坡的资深记者，报道市场、全球经济、大宗商品和投资。 她的报道重点关注货币、人口、技术和政策的变化如何重塑世界各地的商业、财富和日常生活。自 2021 年加入《商业内幕》以来，她报道了从大宗商品繁荣和投资者趋势到中国经济、人工智能贸易以及推动全球市场的力量等方方面面。在加入《商业内幕》之前，她曾为 CNBC、道琼斯、安迅思和《华尔街日报》进行报道。2018 年和 2019 年，她赢得了新加坡交易所因其对全球大宗商品和衍生品市场的报道而荣获 Orb 年度故事奖 - 衍生品。请通过 htan@businessinsider.com 与她联系。
